title: 6 Bunches Eucalyptus Artificial Flowers, Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Leaves Branches Faux Silk Artificial Plants Green Foliage Greenery for Flower Arrangement Home Wedding Party Decoration
features: You will receive: 6 bunches of artificial eucalyptus leaves, each bunch of artificial silver dollar eucalyptus leaves has 9 stems and 72 leaves, each bundle is 60 cm high. Putting 6 bunches of eucalyptus leaves together makes a complete and plump artificial bouquet.

Natural and real: the leaves of eucalyptus plant are made of high-quality silk cloth, which is three-dimensional and soft, and the appearance is realistic; Advanced silk screen printing and dyeing technology makes the leaf veins natural color, more clear and vivid; The rods and stems are wrapped in imitation bark paper and look like real branches; Whether it is in appearance, color or touch, it is comparable to real eucalyptus leaves.

Easy to make style: The branches and stems of artificial plant are made of iron wire, which is very flexible, and you can bend or cut to any height you want. At the same time, make some adjustments to the stems and leaves by hand so that the artificial green foliage reach their maximum size and look more fluffy and natural.

Easy to maintain: Fake eucalyptus, easy to care, no need to water, no need to prune, never wilt, keep fresh for a long time. Faux flowers is the perfect choice for people who are allergic to pollen and don't have the time or planting experience

Wide range of uses: These lifelike artificial greenery not only add vitality to your home, garden, wedding, party and other indoor and outdoor places, Also available as flower arranging accessories, choose to match with other fake flowers to DIY various styles of wedding bouquet, flower arrangements and table centrepiececenter decorations.
description: Product Description HNVNER Artificial Eucalyptus Stems Leaves Faux Eucalyptus Branches HNVNER Fake Eucalyptus Stems for The Decoration to Your Lovely Houseon to Your Lovely House Decorative artificial flora, which requires no daily maintenance, pruning and watering, it still stays green and fresh at all times. Artificial leaves for decoration made of high-quality materialsthat look very real and will not cause children or pets to be allergic to pollen. Eucalyptus branches simply need to be placed in a vase or jar for a simple and elegant display that adds extra vitality and life to your room. Eucalyptus branches work perfectly with any flowers or fake flower,Design different styles of flower bouquet, flower arrangements and table flowers decoration. Add colour and texture to indoor or outdoor flower decorations for weddings, homes and gardens. You will receive: 6 bunches of artificial eucalyptus leaves (vase not included) Length: 23.6 inches (60 cm) Color: Green Please Note： Due to transportation needs, the faux eucalyptus stems in the package is folded transportation, after receiving the goods, please unfold and sort out the branches and leaves.
